CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS TCG CONSTRUCTION, INC., AND DEREK FLORES' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant TCG Construction, Inc. and Derek Flores' unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted. The matter is stayed pending arbitration. See CCP 1281.4.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CELSO ROMERO MENDEZ's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted. Counsel shall supply a proposed order on the MC-053 Judicial Council form.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
